query:
SELECT 
  id,
  code,
  discountType,
  discountValue,
  minPurchaseAmount,
  maxUsageCount,
  usageCount,
  isActive,
  expiresAt,
  CASE
    WHEN isActive != 1 THEN 'HIDDEN: inactive'
    WHEN expiresAt IS NOT NULL AND expiresAt <= NOW() THEN 'HIDDEN: expired'
    WHEN maxUsageCount IS NOT NULL AND usageCount >= maxUsageCount THEN 'HIDDEN: usage limit reached'
    WHEN discountValue IS NULL OR discountValue <= 0 THEN 'INVALID: discount value'
    ELSE 'SHOULD_SHOW'
  END AS coupon_status
FROM coupons
ORDER BY id;

    WHEN expiresAt IS NOT NULL AND expiresAt <= NOW() THEN 'HIDDEN: expired'
    WHEN maxUsageCount IS NOT NULL AND usageCount >= maxUsageCount THEN 'HIDDEN: usage limit reached'
    WHEN discountValue IS NULL OR discountValue <= 0 THEN 'INVALID: discount value'
    ELSE 'SHOULD_SHOW'
  END AS coupon_status
FROM coupons
ORDER BY id;
